notes: Purchasing Performance: Split dual-fetch into independent REQ/PO data loading (halves API calls on filter changes). Fixed loading indicator race condition with separate loading states. Tab-aware refresh button. Restructured PO tracking percentage query to eliminate full table scan (OR to UNION with index support). Added 400ms search debounce to prevent API call per keystroke. Backend query fixes: ID bypass for active status filter on PO/REQ search, derived table optimization for physical inventory allocation lookup, fixed ORDER BY column in transaction history.
